_comment: Declarative reasoning-level -> request-body patches, keyed by model -> level -> apiKind. path is a JSON-pointer-as-list into the outgoing request body. '*' is the fallback for any model. Level is chosen per request via the X-Fabula-Reasoning header, body.extra_body.fabula_reasoning, or FABULA_REASONING_LEVEL. Edit this file to add a model or knob — no adapter code changes.
